title: Initializing
description:
You can initialize Supabase with the static `initialize()` method of the `Supabase` class.

The Supabase client is your entrypoint to the rest of the Supabase functionality
and is the easiest way to interact with everything we offer within the Supabase ecosystem.

params.name: url
params.description: The unique Supabase URL which is supplied when you create a new project in your project dashboard.

params.name: publishableKey
params.description: The publishable (anon) key supplied when you create a new project in your project dashboard. Use this for client-side apps. The deprecated `anonKey` parameter is still accepted but `publishableKey` takes precedence when both are supplied.

params.name: headers
params.description: Custom header to be passed to the Supabase client.

params.name: httpClient
params.description: Custom http client to be used by the Supabase client.

params.name: authOptions
params.description: Options to change the Auth behaviors.

subContent.name: authFlowType
subContent.description: Whether to use the `pkce` flow or the `implicit` flow. Defaults to `pkce`.

subContent.name: localStorage
subContent.description: Parameter to override the local storage to store auth tokens.

subContent.name: autoRefreshToken
subContent.description: Whether to automatically refresh the token when it expires. Defaults to `true`.

params.name: postgrestOptions
params.description: Options to change the Postgrest behaviors.

subContent.name: schema
subContent.description: Schema to query with the Supabase client. Defaults to `public`.

params.name: realtimeClientOptions
params.description: Options to change the Realtime behaviors.

subContent.name: logLevel
subContent.description: Level of realtime server logs to to be logged.

params.name: storageOptions
params.description: Options to change the Storage behaviors.

subContent.name: retryAttempts
subContent.description: The number of times to retry a failed upload request. Defaults to `0`.

subContent.name: useNewHostname
subContent.description: Whether to rewrite legacy storage URLs to use the dedicated storage host (`<ref>.storage.supabase.co`). Set to `true` only if your project has the dedicated storage host enabled. Defaults to `false`.

examples.name: For Flutter
For other Dart projects
